name: Snickers Bar Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 large bag Snickers bars or Milky Way Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix the cake mix with melted margarine and sweetened condensed milk until combined.
3. Spread half of the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes or until set.
5. Slice the candy bars into small pieces.
6. Arrange the pieces on top of the baked crust.
7. With the remaining batter, crumble it over the candy bars.
8. Place the pan back in the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
User safety note: Please ensure that you use a meat thermometer to check that your food has reached a safe internal temperature before consuming.
